sigWerErrors.reason: The extra 'el' does not change the meaning of the sentence; it is a minor grammatical redundancy.
'Verificarlo' (to verify it) and 'revisarlo' (to check it) are very close in meaning in this context; the intent is preserved.
Changing 'por la aplicacion' (through the app) to 'en la aplicacion' (in the app) does not significantly alter the meaning in this context.
The extra 'en' before 'por email' is a minor grammatical error and does not affect the overall meaning.
